front: Film: Travis Bickle attempts to assassinate Senator Palantine and rescues the teenage prostitute Iris (Jodie Foster) from her pimp Sport in a violent brothel shootout

Film: Travis takes his love interest Betsy (a Palantine campaign volunteer) to a porn theater on a date; after she refuses to see him again, he calls to apologize — the camera pans right to an empty hallway
Film: won the Palme d'Or at the 1976 Cannes Film Festival
Film: Betsy tells Travis he reminds her of 'that song by Kris Kristofferson' — a 'walking contradiction'; Travis describes her: 'She appeared like an angel, out of this filthy mess'
Film: fellow taxi driver Wizard tells the protagonist 'You get a job, you become the job'
Film: fan theory holds that the heroic ending — where Travis is celebrated after the brothel shootout — is actually his dying fantasy
